TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog1_bownay a tahes
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.PHON: korkoriŋ maʔrəm.
korkoriŋ maʔrəm.
minʔitol.
minʔitol.
ʔima kiim ka takəm.
ʔima kiim ka takəm.
kitaʔən takəm raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ.
kitaʔən takəm raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ.

TRANSL.notes: "(He) saw the frog inside the container."

S.TRANSL: " saw the frog inside the container."

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ mwaiʔ ila kitaʔ ojæʔ.
ʔæhœʔ mwaiʔ ila kitaʔ ojæʔ.

TRANSL.notes: "(His pet) dog also came to see (the frog)."

S.PHON: hiz~ða korkoriŋ maʔrəm ila næhæn.
hiz~ða korkoriŋ maʔrəm ila næhæn.

S.FORM: hiza takem 'in'aray binbinisitan 'izo' kaSna kaSna'itol ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða takəm ʔinʔaraj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ kaʃna kaʃnaʔitol ila.
S.FORM: hiza takem 'in'aray binbinisitan 'izo' kaSna kaSna'itol ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða takəm ʔinʔaraj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ kaʃna kaʃnaʔitol ila.

TRANSL.notes: "The frog climbed (out) from inside the container."

S.TRANSL: "The frog climbed from inside the container."

S.PHON: hiz~ða korkoriŋ maʔrəm noka ʔæhœʔ ʔitolon.
hiz~ða korkoriŋ maʔrəm noka ʔæhœʔ ʔitolon.
S.TRANSL: 小狗把在睡覺的小孩叫醒.
"The dog woke up the sleeping child."

S.FORM: hiza ka sakosiza ray binbinisitan takem hawka' ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka s~θakos~θiz~ða raj βinβinis~θitan takəm hawkaʔ ila.
S.FORM: hiza ka sakosiza ray binbinisitan takem hawka' ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka s~θakos~θiz~ða raj βinβinis~θitan takəm hawkaʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)看瓶子理的青蛙,但是(青蛙)不見了.

S.TRANSL: 看瓶子理的青蛙,但是 不見了.

TRANSL.notes: "(They) went to take a look at the frog inside the container, (but it's) not there (anymore)."

S.TRANSL: " went to take a look at the frog inside the container, not there ."

S.PHON: hiz~ða korkoriŋ minʔitol.
hiz~ða korkoriŋ minʔitol.
ʔæhœʔ mwaiʔ ila.
ʔæhœʔ mwaiʔ ila.

S.FORM: kisnaray hinoehas korkoring 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: kis~θnaraj hinœhas~θ korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.
S.FORM: kisnaray hinoehas korkoring 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: kis~θnaraj hinœhas~θ korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: "The child called the frog by the window."

S.FORM: hiza noka 'aehoe' binbinisitan paiho'on ka ta'oeloeh hiza ka 'ahoe' 'ima paiho' ray binbinisitan.
S.PHON: hiz~ða noka ʔæhœʔ βinβinis~θitan paihoʔon ka taʔœlœh hiz~ða ka ʔahœʔ ʔima paihoʔ raj βinβinis~θitan.
S.FORM: hiza noka 'aehoe' binbinisitan paiho'on ka ta'oeloeh hiza ka 'ahoe' 'ima paiho' ray binbinisitan.
S.PHON: hiz~ða noka ʔæhœʔ βinβinis~θitan paihoʔon ka taʔœlœh hiz~ða ka ʔahœʔ ʔima paihoʔ raj βinβinis~θitan.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗的頭卡在瓶子裡.
"The dog's head was getting stuck inside the container."

S.PHON: ʔinʔaraj raj hinœhas~θ s~θahæʔ ila.
ʔinʔaraj raj hinœhas~θ s~θahæʔ ila.
korkoriŋ kitaʔ ka ʔæhœʔ s~θis~θahæʔ.
korkoriŋ kitaʔ ka ʔæhœʔ s~θis~θahæʔ.
ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ βinβinis~θitan minlakaj ila.
ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ βinβinis~θitan minlakaj ila.
S.TRANSL: "The dog fell down and the container broke."

S.FORM: korkoring isaa ka 'aehoe' 'aewpoe'oen 'araSen ila rima' ila latar.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ is~θaa ka ʔæhœʔ ʔæwpœʔœn ʔaraʃən ila rimaʔ ila latar.
S.FORM: korkoring isaa ka 'aehoe' 'aewpoe'oen 'araSen ila rima' ila latar.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ is~θaa ka ʔæhœʔ ʔæwpœʔœn ʔaraʃən ila rimaʔ ila latar.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抱著狗帶牠去外面.
"The child carried the dog and took it outside."

S.FORM: hiza korkoring 'oe'oe ila 'oe'oe hiza 'aehoe' ma' 'oe'oe oyae'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ ila ʔœʔœ hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ maʔ ʔœʔœ ojæʔ.
S.FORM: hiza korkoring 'oe'oe ila 'oe'oe hiza 'aehoe' ma' 'oe'oe oyae'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ ila ʔœʔœ hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ maʔ ʔœʔœ ojæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩一直叫,小狗也在叫.

TRANSL.notes: "The child (kept) calling; the dog (kept) calling too."

S.TRANSL: "The child calling; the dog calling too."

S.PHON: s~θiʔœʔœ s~θiʔœʔœ hiz~ða raj kæhkæhœjan.
s~θiʔœʔœ s~θiʔœʔœ hiz~ða raj kæhkæhœjan.
ʔima kanoʔa hiz~ða.
ʔima kanoʔa hiz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 他們不知道那個是什麼.

S.PHON: ma kik βaz~ðæʔ.
ma kik βaz~ðæʔ.
rimaʔ ila hiz~ða kaβih.
rimaʔ ila hiz~ða kaβih.
ʔæhœʔ ʔima tanis~θowaw ʔam tataʔitol hiz~ðaʔ raj kæhœj.
ʔæhœʔ ʔima tanis~θowaw ʔam tataʔitol hiz~ðaʔ raj kæhœj.

TRANSL.notes: 狗跟著(小孩)站在樹那裡.

S.TRANSL: 狗跟著 站在樹那裡.

TRANSL.notes: "The dog followed (him) and stood by the tree."

S.TRANSL: "The dog followed and stood by the tree."

S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ s~θakos~θiz~ða ka minathaŋ ʔœʔœ.
hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ s~θakos~θiz~ða ka minathaŋ ʔœʔœ.
S.TRANSL: "The child peeked in the hole and called."

S.FORM: hiza' hiza' ray hoeroe' takem kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ hiz~ðaʔ raj hœrœʔ takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.FORM: hiza' hiza' ray hoeroe' takem kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ hiz~ðaʔ raj hœrœʔ takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: "The frog came out from the hole there."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' kita' 'am tay'itol komoSa hiza' babaw.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ kitaʔ ʔam tajʔitol komoʃa hiz~ðaʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' kita' 'am tay'itol komoSa hiza' babaw.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ kitaʔ ʔam tajʔitol komoʃa hiz~ðaʔ βaβaw.

TRANSL.notes: "The dog saw and (wanted to) climb up there."

S.TRANSL: "The dog saw and climb up there."

S.PHON: kai kos~θa hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ.
kai kos~θa hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: "(They) didn't expect that to be a beehive."

S.TRANSL: " didn't expect that to be a beehive."

S.PHON: tətəən mwaiʔ ila ka kaʔinaʔan.
tətəən mwaiʔ ila ka kaʔinaʔan.

TRANSL.notes: "(The dog) knocked (on the tree) and (there) came the bees."

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ tajʔitol pontətəən ka kæhœj.
ʔæhœʔ tajʔitol pontətəən ka kæhœj.
S.TRANSL: "The dog stood up and knocked on the tree."

S.FORM: hiza' boya' ay ina sahae' ray rai'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ aj ina s~θahæʔ raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: hiza' boya' ay ina sahae' ray rai'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ aj ina s~θahæʔ raj raiʔ.

S.FORM: hiza' korkoring tay'itol ray kaehoey kita' ka roroo' paykosiza 'a 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ tajʔitol raj kæhœj kitaʔ ka rorooʔ pajkos~θiz~ða ʔa ʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: hiza' korkoring tay'itol ray kaehoey kita' ka roroo' paykosiza 'a 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ tajʔitol raj kæhœj kitaʔ ka rorooʔ pajkos~θiz~ða ʔa ʔœʔœ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上去,看到一些枯葉,把那些撥到一邊,然後喊.
"The child climbed up the tree and saw some rotten leaves and brushed them aside and called out."

S.PHON: korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ ʔœʔœ.
korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ ʔœʔœ.
ʔinʔaraj kæhœj βaβaw ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ mwaiʔ ila ka ʔœwiʔ.
ʔinʔaraj kæhœj βaβaw ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ mwaiʔ ila ka ʔœwiʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 一隻貓頭鷹從樹上(飛了)下來.

S.TRANSL: 一隻貓頭鷹從樹上 下來.
"Came an owl from up the tree."

S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð ka ʔœwiʔ.
kas~θʔœhaz~ð ka ʔœwiʔ.
korkoriŋ homs~θəs~θ.
korkoriŋ homs~θəs~θ.

S.FORM: ina'itol 'aehoe' noka boya' asengen raiw ila.
S.PHON: inaʔitol ʔæhœʔ noka βojaʔ as~θəŋən raiw ila.
S.FORM: ina'itol 'aehoe' noka boya' asengen raiw ila.
S.PHON: inaʔitol ʔæhœʔ noka βojaʔ as~θəŋən raiw ila.
S.TRANSL: "The bees chased the dog; the dog ran away."

S.FORM: hiza' korkoring kita' ka 'oewi' homses raiw ila 'oyae'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ kitaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ homs~θəs~θ raiw ila ʔojæʔ.
S.FORM: hiza' korkoring kita' ka 'oewi' homses raiw ila 'oyae'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ kitaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ homs~θəs~θ raiw ila ʔojæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看到貓頭鷹嚇一跳也跑開了.
"The child got frightened seeing the owl and ran away too."

S.FORM: kisray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila si'oe'oe si'oe'oe hiza' babaw.
S.PHON: kis~θraj βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila s~θiʔœʔœ s~θiʔœʔœ hiz~ðaʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: kisray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila si'oe'oe si'oe'oe hiza' babaw.
S.PHON: kis~θraj βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila s~θiʔœʔœ s~θiʔœʔœ hiz~ðaʔ βaβaw.

TRANSL.notes: "(They) kept calling from above the rock."

S.TRANSL: " kept calling from above the rock."

S.FORM: ray kaehoey mwai' ila ka kano'kano'.
S.PHON: raj kæhœj mwaiʔ ila ka kanoʔkanoʔ.
S.FORM: ray kaehoey mwai' ila ka kano'kano'.
S.PHON: raj kæhœj mwaiʔ ila ka kanoʔkanoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 樹上好像有什麼東西跑出來了.

S.PHON: ilahao ila raj kæhkæhœjan ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ s~θiʔœʔœ.
ilahao ila raj kæhkæhœjan ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ s~θiʔœʔœ.

TRANSL.notes: "(The child) moves close to the trees and calls out."

S.TRANSL: " moves close to the trees and calls out."

S.FORM: wae'ae' mwai' ila kakas'oeha'oehaz hiza' korkoring noka wae'ae' isaa ka korkoring papama' ila ray wae'ae' ba babaw tas bilis ka kah'oeng.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ mwaiʔ ila kakas~θʔœhaʔœhaz~ð hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ noka wæʔæʔ is~θaa ka korkoriŋ papamaʔ ila raj wæʔæʔ βa βaβaw tas~θ βilis~θ ka kahʔœŋ.
S.FORM: wae'ae' mwai' ila kakas'oeha'oehaz hiza' korkoring noka wae'ae' isaa ka korkoring papama' ila ray wae'ae' ba babaw tas bilis ka kah'oeng.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ mwaiʔ ila kakas~θʔœhaʔœhaz~ð hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ noka wæʔæʔ is~θaa ka korkoriŋ papamaʔ ila raj wæʔæʔ βa βaβaw tas~θ βilis~θ ka kahʔœŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩騎在鹿上面,緊緊握著鹿角.
"The child rode on top of the deer and held on tight to its antlers."

S.FORM: hiza' 'arasen ila hiza' 'ae'aeaew maray 'at'atasan hiza' ka korkoring kayni' 'arasen pataaes ka bilis kah'oeng.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ʔaras~θən ila hiz~ðaʔ ʔæʔææw maraj ʔatʔatas~θan hiz~ðaʔ ka korkoriŋ kajniʔ ʔaras~θən pataæs~θ ka βilis~θ kahʔœŋ.
S.FORM: hiza' 'arasen ila hiza' 'ae'aeaew maray 'at'atasan hiza' ka korkoring kayni' 'arasen pataaes ka bilis kah'oeng.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ʔaras~θən ila hiz~ðaʔ ʔæʔææw maraj ʔatʔatas~θan hiz~ðaʔ ka korkoriŋ kajniʔ ʔaras~θən pataæs~θ ka βilis~θ kahʔœŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩不想被帶走,放開緊握著的鹿角.

TRANSL.notes: "The child, not wanting to be taken away, let go (of the deer), of which the antler he held with hands."

S.TRANSL: "The child, not wanting to be taken away, let go , of which the antler he held with hands."

S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila hiz~ðaʔ ra.
s~θahæʔ ila hiz~ðaʔ ra.
hiz~ðaʔ ila ahœʔ.
hiz~ðaʔ ila ahœʔ.

S.FORM: hiza' korkoring paksahae'en ila hao ray ralom 'i'izo'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ paks~θahæʔən ila hao raj ralom ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: hiza' korkoring paksahae'en ila hao ray ralom 'i'izo'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ paks~θahæʔən ila hao raj ralom ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ.
hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ mwaiʔ tatilhæhæl.
hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ mwaiʔ tatilhæhæl.
minʔæw hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ.
minʔæw hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ.

S.FORM: korkoring kaSna'itol ila noka ahoe' sin'aew.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kaʃnaʔitol ila noka ahœʔ s~θinʔæw.
S.FORM: korkoring kaSna'itol ila noka ahoe' sin'aew.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kaʃnaʔitol ila noka ahœʔ s~θinʔæw.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩(爬起來),小狗去救他.

S.TRANSL: "The child climbed up and the dog saved him."

S.FORM: potngor ila ray e ray babaw.
S.PHON: potŋor ila raj ə raj βaβaw.
S.FORM: potngor ila ray e ray babaw.
S.PHON: potŋor ila raj ə raj βaβaw.

S.FORM: hiza' ahoe' hoepayen 'oka' ila nanaw 'ahoe' ma tatilhaehael komosa.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ hœpajən ʔokaʔ ila nanaw ʔahœʔ ma tatilhæhæl komos~θa.
S.FORM: hiza' ahoe' hoepayen 'oka' ila nanaw 'ahoe' ma tatilhaehael komosa.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ hœpajən ʔokaʔ ila nanaw ʔahœʔ ma tatilhæhæl komos~θa.
S.TRANSL: "The dog was tired and with no strength."

S.FORM: pasoatoeroe' ka sapayhini' pay hini' hiza' ahoe' manraan ka hiza' korkoring.
S.PHON: pas~θoatœrœʔ ka s~θapajhiniʔ paj hiniʔ hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ manraan ka hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: pasoatoeroe' ka sapayhini' pay hini' hiza' ahoe' manraan ka hiza' korkoring.
S.PHON: pas~θoatœrœʔ ka s~θapajhiniʔ paj hiniʔ hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ manraan ka hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ.

S.FORM: sakosiza hiza' kitaen takem hiza' rosa' ila.
S.PHON: s~θakos~θiz~ða hiz~ðaʔ kitæn takəm hiz~ðaʔ ros~θaʔ ila.
S.FORM: sakosiza hiza' kitaen takem hiza' rosa' ila.
S.PHON: s~θakos~θiz~ða hiz~ðaʔ kitæn takəm hiz~ðaʔ ros~θaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩轉頭看到青蛙在那裡.
"The child turned and saw the frogs there."

S.FORM: hiza' ahoe' ray kahoey babaw korkoring ray kahoey babaw sakosiza.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ raj kahœj βaβaw korkoriŋ raj kahœj βaβaw s~θakos~θiz~ða.
S.FORM: hiza' ahoe' ray kahoey babaw korkoring ray kahoey babaw sakosiza.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ahœʔ raj kahœj βaβaw korkoriŋ raj kahœj βaβaw s~θakos~θiz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 小狗和小孩回頭往樹上看.
"The dog and the child looked up the tree."

S.PHON: takəm kin ʔakoj ila hiz~ðaʔ.
takəm kin ʔakoj ila hiz~ðaʔ.

S.FORM: hiza' korkoring 'aehae' kosa' o ma'an hiza' ka takem tihoeroeon ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ ʔæhæʔ kos~θaʔ o maʔan hiz~ðaʔ ka takəm tihœrœon ila.
S.FORM: hiza' korkoring 'aehae' kosa' o ma'an hiza' ka takem tihoeroeon ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ ʔæhæʔ kos~θaʔ o maʔan hiz~ðaʔ ka takəm tihœrœon ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩說,我找到我的青蛙了.

S.FORM: nia noka ahoe osa' ta'ilaila simari' 'aehae' ka takem ilahao.
S.PHON: nia noka ahœ os~θaʔ taʔilaila s~θimariʔ ʔæhæʔ ka takəm ilahao.
S.FORM: nia noka ahoe osa' ta'ilaila simari' 'aehae' ka takem ilahao.
S.PHON: nia noka ahœ os~θaʔ taʔilaila s~θimariʔ ʔæhæʔ ka takəm ilahao.
S.TRANSL: 他帶了一隻青蛙去那裡.
"He took one frog and went there."

S.PHON: hiz~ða koʃa pilʔawan i.
hiz~ða koʃa pilʔawan i.
